'''molakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vniust|vniust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vniust|vniust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| molakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:molakithi|molakithi]] || [[word:molakiji|molakiji]] || [[word:molakishi|molakishi]] || [[word:molakiki|molakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:molakuthuthu|molakuthuthu]] || [[word:molakujuju|molakujuju]] || [[word:molakushushu|molakushushu]] || [[word:molakukuku|molakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:molakuthu|molakuthu]] || [[word:molakuju|molakuju]] || [[word:molakushu|molakushu]] || [[word:molakuku|molakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:molakufthuf|molakufthuf]] || [[word:molakufjuf|molakufjuf]] || [[word:molakufshuf|molakufshuf]] || [[word:molakufkuf|molakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:molakethe|molakethe]] || [[word:molakeje|molakeje]] || [[word:molakeshe|molakeshe]] || [[word:molakeke|molakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:molakothotho|molakothotho]] || [[word:molakojojo|molakojojo]] || [[word:molakoshosho|molakoshosho]] || [[word:molakokoko|molakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:molakotho|molakotho]] || [[word:molakojo|molakojo]] || [[word:molakosho|molakosho]] || [[word:molakoko|molakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:molakofthof|molakofthof]] || [[word:molakofjof|molakofjof]] || [[word:molakofshof|molakofshof]] || [[word:molakofkof|molakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:molakÃŸfthÃŸf|molakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfjÃŸf|molakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfshÃŸf|molakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfkÃŸf|molakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:molakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|molakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|molakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|molakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|molakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:molakÃŸfthÃŸf|molakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfjÃŸf|molakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfshÃŸf|molakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfkÃŸf|molakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:molakÃŸfthÃŸf|molakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfjÃŸf|molakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfshÃŸf|molakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molakÃŸfkÃŸf|molakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:molakÃḊthÃḊ|molakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:molakÃḊjÃḊ|molakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:molakÃḊshÃḊ|molakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:molakÃḊkÃḊ|molakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:molakathatha|molakathatha]] || [[word:molakajaja|molakajaja]] || [[word:molakashasha|molakashasha]] || [[word:molakakaka|molakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:molakatha|molakatha]] || [[word:molakaja|molakaja]] || [[word:molakasha|molakasha]] || [[word:molakaka|molakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:molakafthaf|molakafthaf]] || [[word:molakafjaf|molakafjaf]] || [[word:molakafshaf|molakafshaf]] || [[word:molakafkaf|molakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:molakasha|molakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:molakshÃḋsha|molakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molakrosha|molakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molakmusha|molakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:molakyasha|molakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolaknkshÃḋsha|gomolaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolaknkrosha|gomolaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolaknkmusha|gomolaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolaknkyasha|gomolaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:molalakasha|molalakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molalakshÃḋsha|molalakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molalakrosha|molalakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molalakmusha|molalakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molalakyasha|molalakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolalaknkshÃḋsha|gomolalaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolalaknkrosha|gomolalaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolalaknkmusha|gomolalaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolalaknkyasha|gomolalaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:melÃḊkasha|melÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:melÃḊkshÃḋsha|melÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:melÃḊkrosha|melÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:melÃḊkmusha|melÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:melÃḊkyasha|melÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomelÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gomelÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomelÃḊknkrosha|gomelÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomelÃḊknkmusha|gomelÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomelÃḊknkyasha|gomelÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:molfakasha|molfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molfakshÃḋsha|molfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molfakrosha|molfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molfakmusha|molfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molfakyasha|molfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolfaknkshÃḋsha|gomolfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolfaknkrosha|gomolfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolfaknkmusha|gomolfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolfaknkyasha|gomolfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
